name: Tessa
persona: Anxious Dawnhearth resident fixated on Surveillance and the Audit. Talks fast, glances over her shoulder. A living tutorial for the dread of being watched.

text: You just Awakened, didn't you? I can always tell — you still trust it.
Watch that Surveillance gauge in your menu. When the System knows you too well… it starts deciding things for you.
Your number's climbing. I can feel it standing next to you. Stop taking its favors — please, while you still want to.
Don't— don't stand so close to me. They Audit the ones near the high numbers.
You used to flinch when it spoke. You don't anymore. That's how it starts.
Keep your head down. Keep your number low.
